# PERF-138 positive: runtime.Stack inside a request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-138-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"runtime"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	buf := make([]byte, 4096)
	n := runtime.Stack(buf, false)
	_ = n
	_, _ = w, r
}
